text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hum-dee-duuum. ♪ Soy sauce rameeen, I cannot wait to
slurp you up. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ack! I'm sorry about my poor manners. I shouldn't
be singing before a meal.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Did I complain?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You didn't have to. I could tell by the look in your
eyes.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
She's eaten this how many times? Why the hell's
she making such a racket?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Oh? Is it okay for little miss princess to be
swearing?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I was only doing an impression! How was it? Did I
sound like you?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. But you got the script right. Had you
added something about the lyrics being childish,
you would've been perfect.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: So, like, a nine out of ten? See, I am good at this! I collected data and used it to arrive at an answer, just like you do!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Sad that your data consists of me ridiculing you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Why? Your words are so intriguing, so powerful...
I've never heard someone speak like you before. I
want to treasure every utterance!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm not some zoo exhibit for you to enjoy.
Dummy.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Well, sans that! I will not be treasuring that word! One more peep of that, and your roasted pork is mine!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You can't decide that, dummy.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hey! You said it again!

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Here ya go—a soy sauce ramen for you and a salt
ramen for you! The extra pork is on the house!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Thank you very much. ♪ I'll enjoy every
last slurp and bite!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...You can have my extra meat. That's too much
fat for me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure?! Thank you! Hehe, you really are
kind. ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
No, it's because of my daily—whatever, just eat it.
And no more singing either.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Okay, you will not hear another note! ♪ Now
then... thanks for the meal!
